TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Magufuli, title = John_Magufuli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Magufuli} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 10, John Magufuli, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Tanzania ta' misuw hya' ga John Magufuli, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 10, John Magufuli, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Tanzania ta' misuw hya' ga John Magufuli, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *oħn maɣu*uli, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw tanzania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *oħn maɣu*uli, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
